targets.rawSql: select has_thinking, count(*) as turns, avg(output_tokens)::int as avg_output_tokens, avg(input_tokens)::int as avg_input_tokens, avg(cache_creation_input_tokens)::int as avg_cache_creation, avg(cache_read_input_tokens)::int as avg_cache_read from session_turn_details where $__timeFilter(timestamp) group by has_thinking order by has_thinking desc

select $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp, '1h'), sum(case when has_thinking then 1 else 0 end) as thinking_turns, sum(case when has_thinking then 0 else 1 end) as non_thinking_turns from session_turn_details where $__timeFilter(timestamp) group by 1 order by 1

select stop_reason, count(*) as turns, avg(output_tokens)::int as avg_output_tokens, avg(cache_read_input_tokens)::int as avg_cache_read from session_turn_details where $__timeFilter(timestamp) and stop_reason is not null group by stop_reason order by turns desc

select f.session_id, count(distinct f.file_path) as files_modified, sum(f.version) as total_edits, s.total_cost_usd, s.total_input_tokens + s.total_output_tokens as total_tokens from session_file_changes f join (select session_id, max(total_cost_usd) as total_cost_usd, max(total_input_tokens) as total_input_tokens, max(total_output_tokens) as total_output_tokens from session_snapshots group by session_id) s on f.session_id = s.session_id group by f.session_id, s.total_cost_usd, s.total_input_tokens, s.total_output_tokens order by total_edits desc limit 50

panels.title: Files Modified vs Cost Per Session

targets.rawSql: select service_tier, speed, count(*) as turns, avg(output_tokens)::int as avg_output, avg(cache_read_input_tokens)::int as avg_cache_read, avg(cache_creation_ephemeral_1h_tokens)::int as avg_1h_cache, avg(cache_creation_ephemeral_5m_tokens)::int as avg_5m_cache from session_turn_details where $__timeFilter(timestamp) group by service_tier, speed order by turns desc
